label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking how the author learned English. The options are A through D. The key here is to look at the details in the passage. The author starts by saying, "My experience in learning English is very simple." Then they mention that they focused on English for over two years but had problems because of a lack of professional learning and relying on Chinese thoughts. The author also says that despite weaknesses, they achieved a lot through everyday learning and practice. They mention that some people think it's a miracle and attribute it to their perseverance, but the author says that perseverance isn't the only factor. Then the author contrasts their own experience with other students who have teachers, classes, and learning materials but still can't learn well. The author implies that the key is using English every day, comparing it to math, which everyone needs to use daily even if not everyone becomes a mathematician. So
